title: RePendents|Artifacts
description: Change textures of 3 pendents from Artifacts mod
body: I don't like textures of pendents from [https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts), and I change them. Check this mod, I made textures for it too https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-many-more-mechanisms/comments
